results.title: XOM Downgraded by Wolfe Research -- Rating Changed to Peer Perform
Exxon Mobil (XOM) Analyst Ratings Update: Price Target Adjusted | XOM Stock News
ExxonMobil (XOM) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026 $XOM

results.summary: Wolfe Research downgraded XOM to 'Peer Perform' from 'Outperform' on Apr 21, 2026 (analyst: Doug Leggate, no new price target). Multiple price target raises in April 2026: Wells Fargo (Sam Margolin) to $185 from $183; Jefferies (Lloyd Byrne) to $184 from $178; RBC Capital (Biraj Borkhataria) to $180 from $160; JP Morgan (Arun Jayaram) to $170 from $140. TD Cowen maintains Buy but trimmed PT to $172 from $175. 24-analyst consensus: Buy, avg PT ~$153.54.
